nudge_model:
<u>nudge_model</u>
Toggle to activate nudging.
True = Nudging ON
False = Nudging OFF
nudge_path:
<u>nudge_path</u>
Path to target files containing nudging data.
nudge_file_template:
<u>nudge_file_template</u>
Target filename template with year, month, day, and second values replaced by %y, %m, %d, and %s respectively.
nudge_times_per_day:
<u>nudge_times_per_day</u>
Number of target files per day.
Example: 4 = 6-hourly data
model_times_per_day:
<u>model_times_per_day</u>
Number of times per day that nudging tendencies are updated.
Must be longer than the model timestep and shorter than the target timestep.
nudge_uprof:
<u>nudge_uprof</u>
Selectively apply nudging to U:
OFF = Switch off nudging
ON = Apply nudging everywhere
WINDOW = Apply window function
0 = OFF
1 = ON
2 = WINDOW
nudge_vprof:
<u>nudge_vprof</u>
Selectively apply nudging to V:
OFF = Switch off nudging
ON = Apply nudging everywhere
WINDOW = Apply window function
0 = OFF
1 = ON
2 = WINDOW
nudge_tprof:
<u>nudge_tprof</u>
Selectively apply nudging to T:
OFF = Switch off nudging
ON = Apply nudging everywhere
WINDOW = Apply window function
0 = OFF
1 = ON
2 = WINDOW
nudge_qprof:
<u>nudge_qprof</u>
Selectively apply nudging to Q:
OFF = Switch off nudging
ON = Apply nudging everywhere
WINDOW = Apply window function
0 = OFF
1 = ON
2 = WINDOW
nudge_ucoef:
<u>nudge_ucoef</u>
Selectively adjust the nudging strength applied to U.
Normalized coefficient [0.,1.]
nudge_vcoef:
<u>nudge_vcoef</u>
Selectively adjust the nudging strength applied to V.
Normalized coefficient [0.,1.]
nudge_tcoef:
<u>nudge_tcoef</u>
Selectively adjust the nudging strength applied to T.
Normalized coefficient [0.,1.]
nudge_qcoef:
<u>nudge_qcoef</u>
Selectively adjust the nudging strength applied to Q.
Normalized coefficient [0.,1.]
nudge_beg_year:
<u>nudge_beg_year</u>
Year to begin nudging.
Format: YYYY
nudge_end_year:
<u>nudge_end_year</u>
Year to stop nudging.
Format: YYYY
nudge_hwin_lat0:
<u>nudge_hwin_lat0</u>
Specify the horizontal center of the window (lat0) in degrees.
[-90., +90.]
nudge_hwin_lon0:
<u>nudge_hwin_lon0</u>
Specify the horizontal center of the window (lon0) in degrees.
[0., 360.]
nudge_hwin_latwidth:
<u>nudge_hwin_latwidth</u>
Latitude width of the horizontal window in degrees.
Large values make the window constant in latitude.
>0
nudge_hwin_lonwidth:
<u>nudge_hwin_lonwidth</u>
Longitude width of the horizontal window in degrees.
Large values make the window constant in longitude.
>0
nudge_hwin_latdelta:
<u>nudge_hwin_latdelta</u>
Latitude transition length for the horizontal window.
Controls smoothing of the window edge.
nudge_hwin_londelta:
<u>nudge_hwin_londelta</u>
Longitude transition length for the horizontal window.
Controls smoothing of the window edge.
nudge_hwin_invert:
<u>nudge_hwin_invert</u>
Logical flag to invert the horizontal window function.
True/False
nudge_vwin_hindex:
<u>nudge_vwin_hindex</u>
Vertical window high index.
Model level index where the upper transition begins.
nudge_vwin_lindex:
<u>nudge_vwin_lindex</u>
Vertical window low index.
Model level index where the lower transition begins.
nudge_vwin_hdelta:
<u>nudge_vwin_hdelta</u>
Vertical window high delta.
Transition thickness near the high index.
nudge_vwin_ldelta:
<u>nudge_vwin_ldelta</u>
Vertical window low delta.
Transition thickness near the low index.
nudge_vwin_invert:
<u>nudge_vwin_invert</u>
Logical flag to invert the vertical window function.
True/False
nudge_timescale_opt:
<u>nudge_timescale_opt</u>
Timescale for relaxation:
WEAK = Constant
STRONG = Variable
0 = WEAK
1 = STRONG
nudge_force_opt:
<u>nudge_force_opt</u>
Target value form:
NEXT = Target at next future time
LINEAR = Linear interpolation
0 = NEXT
1 = LINEAR
